home.page_title: Fresco | Fresh deals from AH & Jumbo
home.desc: All supermarket deals in one place. Save on your groceries every week, free for everyone.
home.stores_sub: Deals from two of the largest supermarkets in the Netherlands
home.ah_desc: All bonus deals from AH, from fresh vegetables to household products. New deals every week.
home.jumbo_desc: All weekly deals from Jumbo, from fresh meat to dairy and drinks. Updated every week.

search.placeholder: Search products, e.g. cheese or chicken...

deals.title: All Deals
deals.subtitle: View all deals from AH and Jumbo
deals.store_notice: In-store deals only. Online delivery deals are not included.

about.desc: Fresco is an independent platform that collects all supermarket deals from Albert Heijn and Jumbo in one place every week. No registration, no costs. Just the best deals, week after week.
about.pillar1_body: Every week, the new deals from AH and Jumbo are collected and published. Always up to date.
about.pillar2_body: Fresco is and stays free for everyone. No account, no subscription. Just browse and save.
about.pillar3_body: Compare deals from Albert Heijn and Jumbo side by side and pick what works best for you.
about.how_sub: Three steps to the best deals of the week
about.step1_body: Use the search bar or filter by store to find the deals you need.
about.step2_body: View deals from AH and Jumbo side by side and see where you save the most.
about.step3_body: Click 'View deal' to go straight to the offer on the AH or Jumbo website.
about.disclaimer_body: Fresco only shows deals valid in physical stores. Online delivery deals are not included. Prices may vary, so always check the supermarket website or app for the latest information.

footer.tagline: All supermarket deals in one place.
footer.disclaimer: In-store deals only. Prices may vary.

cookie.title: We use cookies
cookie.subtitle: Your choice, your privacy
cookie.text: We use Google Analytics to anonymously track how the site is used. No personal data, no ads.
cookie.trust: No personal data · No ads · Always reversible

app.desc: Install Fresco from your browser. No App Store, no download.
app.selector_sub: We'll show you the exact steps for your phone.
app.safari_note: Use Safari on iPhone. Chrome does not support installation.
app.chrome_note: Use Chrome on Android for best results.
app.step2: Tap the Share button at the bottom
app.step3: Scroll down, tap 'Add to Home Screen'
app.step5: Fresco is on your home screen!
app.android_step2: Tap the menu button at the top right
app.android_step5: Fresco is on your home screen!
app.why_sub: All the benefits of a native app, straight from your browser
app.feat1_body: Opens straight from your home screen in full screen, just like a real app.
app.feat2_body: No browser chrome, no distractions. A clean app experience on any phone.
app.feat3_body: Install in seconds without an account or download. Always up to date automatically.
app.feat4_body: Your cookie preferences carry over. Nothing changes — just a shortcut to Fresco.

notfound.title: Page not found
notfound.desc: This page doesn't exist or has been moved.
